## Checklist

- [ ] Branch created from latest `develop`
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or API keys committed
- [ ] No real or production-like PII / datasets committed
- [ ] Changes are scoped to my workstream's owned modules (or coordinated if touching shared files)
- [ ] Tests added/updated (`backend/tests/...` or frontend component tests)
- [ ] CI passing
- [ ] Cross-module contracts followed `docs/architecture/integration-contracts.md` (if applicable)
